⚔ E&P Team Builder

Hero database · engine-based team builder · emblem & troop guidance — Raids, Wars & Titans

My Roster

The full catalog is here — select only the heroes you own, then set copies (duplicates can fill multiple war teams) and 🎭 costumes owned (each adds a stat bonus the engine counts). Team suggestions use your selection; the Hero Database tab always shows everyone.
➕ Add a hero not in the database
Paste the hero's special-skill text and the app will auto-detect its roles (heal, taunt, mana control, etc.). Custom heroes are saved in your browser.

Hero Database

Browse every hero — search name, skill or passive text (try "taunt", "revive", "fiend"), filter, then click any hero for full details, an emblem path, a troop recommendation and their best partners. Heroes in team suggestions are clickable too.

Team Builder

Build any five-hero team and get live analysis — synergy rules firing, anti-synergy warnings, speed curve, colors and an engine score graded against the best team your roster can field (Very weak → Elite). Click a slot to select it, then click a hero below to place them (or just click heroes to fill left-to-right). Save teams and log results in one click. Every suggestion card also has a 🛠️ button that opens it here.

Pick heroes

Counter-Planner

Enter an enemy defense (any hero in the catalog — you don't need to own them; middle slot = their tank). The app reads their threats and builds the best counter from your roster: heal-block against healers, anti-revive against Nine Lives, bypass against counterattack. Save enemy defenses for war planning.

Pick enemy heroes (full catalog)

Raid / War Defense

Builds defenses around engines: family synergies, always-on passives, taunt→payoff loops, mana denial + heal-block chains — then checks speed curve and element spread. Top 3 options shown. Scores are graded against the strongest lineup your roster can field under the selected battle rules — 100% = your ceiling.

Raid Offense (3-2 stack)

War Offense — 6 Teams

Six attack teams with no hero reused, each color-stacked against a different tank color, each with a healer/support pair where possible.

Titans

Battle Log

Log battles as you play — over time this shows which teams actually win for you. Saved in your browser; Export to back it up.
🧠 Learning: no community data loaded yet
🎲 Board luck — one tap, be honest: lucky wins count less, unlucky losses count more
📏 Margin — optional: how decisive was it? (tap again to clear)
💥 Why the loss? — optional, one tap
⚔ Your team
⭐ Your MVP — optional: tap who carried
🛡 Enemy team — optional, but it trains the counter engine
🎯 Biggest threat — optional: tap the enemy that wrecked your plan
Full hero catalog (1,750+ heroes incl. costumes) sourced from the E&P Fandom wiki (CC-BY-SA) with a hand-curated core roster, July 2026. Team recommendations are rule-based on skills, families, synergy pairs, speed and power. Emblem paths and troop picks use community breakpoint data (empuzzled / oldcynic, July 2026). Hero portraits hotlinked from the E&P Fandom wiki — artwork © Small Giant Games / Zynga.
